query: implement phase 6 cli and server update self-update commands

results.title: Docs cleanup and dynamic skill retrieval plan
results.content: Cleaned the core docs so README, docs/GUIDE.md, docs/cli.md, and the coder-cli skill now reflect the current command surface from cmd/coder/main.go and explicitly label roadmap-only commands as future design. Added docs/dynamic_skill_retrieval_plan.md proposing a phased upgrade: structured skill output for LLMs, a server-side skill resolver, session-scoped active skills, re-resolve triggers during work, and context budgeting so agents can fetch and swap skills mid-task instead of locking retrieval at submit time.

results.title: README + CLI docs + dashboard-plan cleanup
results.content: Updated docs/cli.md: full command reference for all 3 groups (A=quick AI: chat/review/debug/plan/qa/session/workflow, B=lifecycle: new-project/map-codebase/discuss-phase/plan-phase/execute-phase/ship/progress/next/milestone, C=utilities: todo/stats/health/note/do). Updated README.md: fixed broken links (skill_architecture.md→skill_system.md, memory.md→memory_system.md), added GUIDE.md to docs table, updated Features table (+AI Workflow Commands +Project Lifecycle +Web Dashboard), updated Key Commands section with 3 groups, added 5 Steps quick start (with lifecycle example), updated tagline, added Intelligence Roadmap link. Deleted docs/dashboard-plan.md (feature already implemented and documented in docs/dashboard.md). Build OK.

results.title: Phase 9-17 CLI Commands Implemented
results.content: Implemented all project lifecycle commands for coder CLI (phases 9-17 from roadmap-intelligence-flows.md). Files created: cmd_new_project.go (runNewProject - Q&A → REQUIREMENTS.md/ROADMAP.md/STATE.md), cmd_map_codebase.go (runMapCodebase - 4 sequential analyses → STACK/ARCH/CONVENTIONS/CONCERNS.md), cmd_discuss_phase.go (runDiscussPhase - gray-area Q&A → CONTEXT.md), cmd_plan_phase.go (runPlanPhase - research + XML plans + verification loop), cmd_execute_phase.go (runExecutePhase - wave-based execution + parsePlanXML + atomic git commits), cmd_ship.go (runShip - gh pr create with AI-generated body), cmd_progress.go (runProgress + runNext - STATE.md-aware navigation), cmd_milestone.go (runMilestone - audit/complete/archive/next lifecycle), cmd_todo.go (runTodo/runStats/runHealth/runNote/runDo - project utilities). All commands registered in main.go. go build + go vet both pass clean. STATE.md format: frontmatter fields + ## Decisions/Blockers/Backlog/PRs sections. XML plan

results.title: CLI packaging, upgrade checks, and changed-file refresh
results.content: Completed the remaining high-value CLI transition slices: added hatchling package metadata in pyproject.toml, CI package build verification in .github/workflows/ci.yml, PyPI trusted publishing and release asset attachments in .github/workflows/release.yml, CLI install/usage docs in README.md and docs/guides/minder-cli.md, sync-time PyPI upgrade notices in src/minder/cli.py, and changed-file path pruning in src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py so stale symbols are removed on resync. Validated with uv build, focused pytest, ruff, and mypy.

results.title: Lifecycle commands synced to all agent layers
results.content: Updated all 3 layers to include Group B lifecycle commands (new-project, map-codebase, discuss-phase, plan-phase, execute-phase, ship, progress, next, milestone) and Group C utilities (todo, stats, health, note, do). Files updated: .github/copilot-instructions.md (replaced AI Workflow Commands section with 3 groups A/B/C), .agents/workflows/full-lifecycle-delivery.md (added Lifecycle Path section with per-phase loop), .agents/workflows/execute-plan.md (added lifecycle path mode detection, coder debug on error, coder note for blockers), .agents/workflows/new-requirement.md (added scope detection: small feature vs new project with coder new-project, next steps branching), .agents/workflows/update-planning.md (added coder progress/next/health/milestone audit/note integration). All workflows now aware of both quick-path (PLAN.md) and lifecycle-path (STATE.md) modes.
